title: Router Config
shortDesc: Cisco router setup with OSPF, DHCP, NAT/PAT and ACL security.
previewCode:
Router> enable
Router# configure terminal
Router(config)# hostname R1
! Configure interface
Router(config)# int fa0/0
Router(config-if)# ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
overview: Complete mastery of Cisco router configuration: from basic interface setup and static routing to dynamic routing protocols (OSPF, EIGRP), NAT/PAT for internet sharing, DHCP pools, and access control lists.
fullCode:
Router> enable
Router# configure terminal
Router(config)# hostname R1

! Configure WAN interface
Router(config)# interface GigabitEthernet0/0
Router(config-if)# ip address 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.0
Router(config-if)# ip nat outside
Router(config-if)# no shutdown

! Configure LAN interface
Router(config)# interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Router(config-if)# ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
Router(config-if)# ip nat inside
Router(config-if)# no shutdown

! DHCP Pool
Router(config)# ip dhcp pool LAN_POOL
Router(dhcp-config)# network 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
Router(dhcp-config)# default-router 192.168.1.1
Router(dhcp-config)# dns-server 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4

! NAT/PAT
Router(config)# access-list 1 permit 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255
Router(config)# ip nat inside source list 1 interface Gi0/0 overload

! OSPF
Router(config)# router ospf 1
Router(config-router)# network 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
Router(config-router)# passive-interface GigabitEthernet0/1

title: Switch / VLAN
shortDesc: VLAN creation, trunk ports, inter-VLAN routing and port security.
previewCode:
Switch# conf t
! Create VLANs
Switch(config)# vlan 10
Switch(config-vlan)# name SALES
Switch(config)# vlan 20
Switch(config-vlan)# name IT_DEPT
overview: Expert VLAN configuration on Cisco Catalyst switches. I design and implement VLAN segmentation for department isolation, configure 802.1Q trunk links, set up Router-on-a-Stick for inter-VLAN routing, and harden switches with port security.
fullCode:
Switch# configure terminal

! Create VLANs
Switch(config)# vlan 10
Switch(config-vlan)# name MANAGEMENT
Switch(config)# vlan 20
Switch(config-vlan)# name SALES
Switch(config)# vlan 30
Switch(config-vlan)# name IT_DEPT
Switch(config)# vlan 40
Switch(config-vlan)# name GUEST

! Access ports
Switch(config)# interface range Fa0/1 - 5
Switch(config-if-range)# switchport mode access
Switch(config-if-range)# switchport access vlan 20
Switch(config-if-range)# spanning-tree portfast
Switch(config-if-range)# switchport port-security maximum 2
Switch(config-if-range)# switchport port-security violation restrict

! Trunk to router
Switch(config)# interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)# switchport mode trunk
Switch(config-if)# switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30,40
Switch(config-if)# switchport trunk native vlan 10

! STP root bridge
Switch(config)# spanning-tree vlan 10,20,30,40 root primary

title: Firewall / ACL
shortDesc: Named extended ACLs, zone-based firewall, DMZ design and NAT.
previewCode:
! Extended ACL
Router(config)# ip access-list extended WEB_FILTER
Router(config-ext-nacl)# permit tcp any
  host 192.168.1.10 eq 80
Router(config-ext-nacl)# deny ip any any log
overview: Deep expertise in network security configuration. I design ACL rule sets to permit/deny traffic at a granular level, configure DMZ zones on Cisco ASA firewalls, implement NAT/PAT, and apply rate-limiting to mitigate common attack vectors.
fullCode:
! Named Extended ACL – Inbound on WAN
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_TO_DMZ
  remark -- Allow HTTP/S to web server --
  permit tcp any host 192.168.2.10 eq 80
  permit tcp any host 192.168.2.10 eq 443
  remark -- Allow DNS queries --
  permit udp any host 192.168.2.20 eq 53
  remark -- Block everything else --
  deny   ip any any log

! Named Extended ACL – Inbound on LAN  
ip access-list extended INSIDE_TO_OUT
  permit tcp 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 80
  permit tcp 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 443
  permit tcp 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 587
  deny   tcp 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 23 log
  permit ip 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 any

! Apply to interfaces
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
  ip access-group OUTSIDE_TO_DMZ in
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
  ip access-group INSIDE_TO_OUT in
